values.name: rule
values.comment:
Enforces listing all specific cases if possible

    config =
        [ NoCatchAllForSpecificRemainingPatterns.rule
        ]


### reported

    type Resource
        = Loaded String
        | FailedToLoad String
        | Loading

    displayResource : Resource -> Ui
    displayResource resource =
        case resource of
            Loaded text ->
                Ui.text text

            _ ->
                Ui.spinner

    resourceIsLoaded : Resource -> Bool
    resourceIsLoaded resource =
        case resource of
            Loaded _ ->
                True

            _ ->
                False


## allowed

    displayResource : Resource -> Ui
    displayResource resource =
        case resource of
            Loaded text ->
                Ui.text text

            FailedToLoad reason ->
                Ui.text ("failed to load due to " ++ reason)

            Loading ->
                Ui.spinner

    resourceIsLoaded : Resource -> Bool
    resourceIsLoaded resource =
        case resource of
            Loaded _ ->
                True

            FailedToLoad _ ->
                False

            Loading ->
                False

This works for variant, list and cons patterns.
